text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's too bad. At least you tried.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't think it's just skill but the positioning of
the plushies and the strength of the claw that
contribute to the game's difficulty.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is, don't feel bad about it. It's
not your fault.
